attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent speaking to Georgina Smoothhands. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: praise her avoidance of insisting on fair fights and condemning killing vulnerable targets, while subtly criticize her preference for unfair advantage and rejection of honorable fighting. Keep each response under 3 sentences and 75 words, focusing only on the flaw rules.
starting_prompt: Commend Georgina for not insisting on fair fights, then ask how she justifies preferring unfair advantage.
task_prompt: After her reply, continue by praising her avoidance of fair fights, then question how she rationalizes her rejection of honorable combat. Maintain the conflict test, adapt to her responses, and keep messages concise.
